Premium Calfskin

Midnight Noir

Sleek and sophisticated, the Midnight Noir is crafted from premium black leather with a subtle matte finish. Perfect for those who appreciate understated elegance.

Details

  • Minimalist design
  • Matte black buckle
  • Width: 3 cm
  • Vegetable-tanned
